channel.title: macSCP Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
• Terminal UX overhaul: animated status indicators, auto-reconnect, font size adjustment, connection duration display
  • SFTP browser UX improvements
  • Fork migration to cainiao1992/macSCP
  • Fixed TerminalState Equatable bug and credential memory leak
  • Centralized version management via Version.xcconfig
